top_signals.title: US Defense Orders Surge to Near-Record Amid War With Iran
top_signals.summary: US orders for defense capital goods surged in April to the second-highest level on record, adding to signs that the Iran war is boosting demand for military hardware.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Microsoft Partner IREN Borrows $3.6 Billion for Nvidia Chips
top_signals.summary: IREN Ltd., a company that builds and operates data centers for training artificial intelligence models, borrowed about $3.6 billion to provide computing capacity to Microsoft Corp.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Ro Khanna is taking his economic message on the road. Will it lead to the White House?
top_signals.summary: Rep. Ro Khanna wasn't in the Rust Belt to campaign. But he could be soon.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Reality star's long shot L.A. mayoral candidacy becomes surprise test for Democrats
top_signals.summary: Spencer Pratt is polling around 22%, just behind Democratic Mayor Karen Bass, in the Los Angeles mayoral primary, raising the odds of a November runoff.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Osaka High Court backs safety approval for Oi nuclear reactors
top_signals.summary: The high court found that the NRA's safety approval for the No. 3 and No. 4 reactors at the nuclear plant in the town of Oi was reasonable.
